expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 激活备份LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP来分担核心聚合层拥塞。通过将20%的优先企业流量从主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 重新路由到备份链路，目标是将链路利用率降低至80%以下，满足SLA延迟保证。同时应用QoS策略确保高优先级企业用户和IoT传感器的服务质量。

business_case.justification: Critical SLA violation risk for enterprise customers. Preventing churn from Acme Corp Logistics and other gold-tier enterprise subscribers. Current 42.8ms latency exceeds 20ms SLA guarantee. Estimated loss of 2.5% churn rate translates to ~$15K/month revenue risk if not addressed.
